productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Phantom Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe Phantom from adidas is a plush high mileage training shoe for neutral runners. Adidas continues to deliver ultimate comfort and a smooth ride in one package with this shoe. Choose this for a comfortable, durable option when you're running every day and need a shoe that can keep up with your training schedule.Product DetailsComplete mesh upper for breathability with synthetic overlays for added durabilityThree flurescent green rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure and styleSynthetic central lacing for snug Fit and a luxuriously padded collar to prevent the ankle from twistingPadded tongue for snug fit and overlays of glossy synthetic for styling effectLightly cushioned insole for ergonomic fitEVA-injected adiPrene midsole for lightweight comfortAdiWear outsole with multi-directional flex grooves for added tractionMultiple rubber lugs all over the outsole for increased grip on any groundArched for ergonomic comfortMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
